framework.name: Section 6: Agent-to-Agent Delegation with Trust Chain
framework.description: Dedicated section for multi-hop delegation — delegation request, AS validation at each hop, and trust chain preservation. This is the draft's answer to hop-2+. Critically, it's a NEW mechanism, not RFC 8693 token exchange — confirming that token exchange alone doesn't solve this.
framework.raw_quote: Agent-to-Agent Delegation... Delegation Request... Authorization Server Validation... Trust Chain Preservation
